note: Vendor-neutral routing. Consumer asks (jurisdiction, kind, legalForm) and gets an actionable decision; it never names a vendor. Registry truth lives in the evidence file; vendor selection and ordering model live here.

kyc.com.note: Order the case; base docs included, additional docs requestable within the case. No per-document SKU.

handelsregister.de.note: Free. Browser-scraper provider client; order the document directly.

inpi.rne.note: Free REST API (JWT): login -> /companies/{siren}/attachments -> /{actes,bilans}/{id}/download. See inpi_client.py.

infogreffe.note: Paid ~3.06 EUR/electronic doc (professional account). Certified Kbis.

companies-house.uk.note: Free REST API (Public Data + Document API), free API key. Serves filed document images incl. articles.

actionVocabulary.use_delivered: Document arrives with the case bundle; classify the delivered file.
actionVocabulary.use_delivered_with_warning: As above, but flag the completeness limitation.
actionVocabulary.order: Place an additional request via the resolved vendor.
actionVocabulary.order_with_warning: As above, but surface the completeness badge.
actionVocabulary.manual: No registry document; use the fallback (e.g. company's own register).
actionVocabulary.unavailable: No route to this document in this jurisdiction.
